result: If I could change one thing about the world, I would want to find a way to greatly reduce or eliminate armed conflict and war. I believe that war and violence cause immense suffering and hold humanity back. If nations and groups could find peaceful ways to resolve differences, it would prevent so much death, trauma, poverty and hardship. Those resources could instead go towards improving quality of life for all. Of course, achieving world peace is incredibly complex and challenging. But I believe it's an ideal to strive for and would make the biggest positive difference for humanity if it could be realized.
